reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the current README spec-report renderer independence claim covered by specdown generation, focused renderer-independent CLI tests, and command catalog inspection.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names deterministic spec report generation and renderer-independent CLI inspection surfaces.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by specdown generation from docs/specs/index.spec.md, focused tests proving doctor readiness and claim packet validation do not require specdown in a host repo, command catalog proof that doctor, discover claims, evaluate, and improve surfaces are discoverable, and packet-inspection commands over eval-plan and improve-input packets.
